description: A customer wants to block all outgoing international calls from their phone to prevent accidental charges.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and verify their request.
Access the service feature management tool and apply the 'International Call Block' feature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the blocking feature to the customer's line.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that the block has been applied and is effective immediately.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly confirms the action has been completed.
